meaning: The residue of the block base B modulo the purely periodic modulus M in B = qM + k.
The quotient in the canonical decomposition B = qM + k. It supplies the missing factor in the exact geometric series.

repo_aliases: raw powers in the q=1 bridge case
meaning: The uncarried block coefficients in the exact identity 1/M = Σ qk^j / B^(j+1).
The deterministic carry process that converts raw coefficients into admissible base-B blocks.
The finite algebraic body term in the decomposition R = W + F.
The finite correction term completing the reptend decomposition R = W + F.
A block width m for which B = base^m exceeds M and the residue k = B mod M is small enough to make early coefficients easy to read.
An element of order (p-1)/2 in (Z/pZ)*, equivalently a generator of the subgroup of quadratic residues.

preferred_label: remainder orbit under multiplication by the base
meaning: The long-division remainder sequence r_{n+1} = Br_n mod N, interpreted as a walk on the unit group.
